headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on Entergy, Raises Price Target to $123
summary: Keybanc  analyst Sophie Karp   maintains Entergy (NYSE:ETR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $118 to $123.

headline: How The Entergy (ETR) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Guidance And Capital Plans
summary: Entergy’s base case fair value estimate has shifted from US$113.56 to US$115.56 per share, a move of about 1.8% that puts a slightly higher marker on what analysts see as reasonable value for the stock. Recent research updates link this change to the latest Q4 reporting cycle, refreshed 2026 to 2029 guidance, and differing views on how capital plans and sector sentiment might influence earnings visibility and valuation. As you read on, you will see how to track these evolving views and what...

headline: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage On Entergy with Buy Rating, Announces Price Target of $130
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   initiates coverage on Entergy (NYSE:ETR) with a Buy rating and announces Price Target of $130.

headline: Meta's $27 Billion Data Center Places the Spotlight on Natural Gas Stocks
summary: If a data center is being built, look at what company is providing the energy to power it.
